# appearance

## Plugin reference

- Description: Appearance settings surface: the light/dark theme toggle as a Settings sidebar entry.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Settings.Sidebar` "Appearance" → `ThemeSidebarItem`
  - Uses: `apps/settings/shell.Settings`, `theme.ThemeSidebarItem`
